mustPass: Scaffold must support both inspiration and conversion: visitors should be able to see the property and understand how to book.
Room and pricing information must have a dedicated surface because it is core to this industry.
Booking must have its own route because booking intent is primary for hotel and lodging sites.
Contact route must support both direct contact and finding the property physically.
Copy structure must support practical guest concerns such as amenities, cancellation terms and arrival information.
All routes from routes.json are present.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Do not model the site like a generic local service business with only services pages.
Do not replace room/pricing content with vague marketing copy about comfort or quality.
Do not force restaurant-specific structures such as full menu pages unless the business actually operates that as a core offer.
Do not imply instant booking if the actual flow is only an inquiry form or external link.
Do not overuse repeated trust blocks that say the same thing on every page.
